attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
XCTRX.TRX_SC_ID
,XCTRX.TRX_ID
,XCTRX.TRX_TYPE
,COALESCE(XCTRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID,-9999)
,COALESCE(XCTRX.LOOSING_VERSION_ID,-999)
,LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER
,XCTRX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,XCTRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID
,XCTRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE
,XCTRX.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
,XCTRX.CREATED_BY
,XCTRX.CREATION_DATE
,XCTRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY
,XCTRX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE
,XCTRX.CLAIM_ID
,COALESCE(XCTRX.SC_ID,-999)
,XCTRX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY
,XCTRX.REJECTION_REASON_CODE
,XCTRX.PARTNER
,XCTRX.OTM_DATE
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_1
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11
,XCTRX.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE    
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC XCTRX
WHERE XCTRX.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND XCTRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE<>'ORDHD'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY XCTRX.TRX_SC_ID ORDER BY XCTRX.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
 
UNION
 
SELECT 
XCTRX.TRX_SC_ID
,XCTRX.TRX_ID
,XCTRX.TRX_TYPE
,COALESCE(XCTRX.LOOSING_NODE_ID,-9999)
,COALESCE(XCTRX.LOOSING_VERSION_ID,-999)
,XCTRX.LOOSING_SALESREP_NUMBER
,XCTRX.TRX_ORIG_CODE
,SALES_LINE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS SOURCE_TRX_ID
,XCTRX.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE
,XCTRX.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
,XCTRX.CREATED_BY
,XCTRX.CREATION_DATE
,XCTRX.LAST_UPDATED_BY
,XCTRX.LAST_UPDATED_DATE
,XCTRX.CLAIM_ID
,COALESCE(XCTRX.SC_ID,-999)
,XCTRX.TRX_SPLIT_BU_KEY
,XCTRX.REJECTION_REASON_CODE
,XCTRX.PARTNER
,XCTRX.OTM_DATE
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_1
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_2
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_3
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_4
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_5
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_6
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_7
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_8
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_9
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_10
,XCTRX.NODE_ID_LEVEL_11
,XCTRX.SPLIT_ADJUSTED_VALUE    
FROM 
(SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.XXNCE_CLAIM_TRX_SC
 WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND TRX_SOURCE_TYPE='ORDHD'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TRX_SC_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1)XCTRX
 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SALES_ORDER
ON SALES_ORDER.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT=XCTRX.SOURCE_TRX_ID
AND SALES_ORDER.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SALES_ORDER.SS_CODE='CG'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV SALES_LINE
ON SALES_LINE.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SALES_ORDER.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SALES_LINE.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SALES_LINE.SS_CODE='CG'
